name: nearmiss-web
description: Framework-free accessible map UI for nearmiss.

scripts.axe: node axe_check.mjs ../index.html && node axe_check.mjs ../404.html && node axe_check.mjs index.html && node axe_check.mjs davis-demo.html && node axe_check.mjs submit.html && node axe_check.mjs embed.html && node axe_check.mjs us-coverage.html && node axe_check.mjs studio.html && node axe_check.mjs dossier.html
scripts.rtl: node rtl_check.mjs ../index.html && node rtl_check.mjs ../404.html && node rtl_check.mjs index.html && node rtl_check.mjs davis-demo.html && node rtl_check.mjs submit.html && node rtl_check.mjs embed.html && node rtl_check.mjs us-coverage.html && node rtl_check.mjs studio.html && node rtl_check.mjs dossier.html
scripts.contract: node contract_check.mjs && node us_coverage_check.mjs && node workflow_check.mjs
